text.cn: 茶餐廳不收人民幣移動支付。店員盯著你的手機：『八達通？現金港幣？』
text.en: The cha chaan teng won't take RMB mobile pay. Staff stares at your phone: 'Octopus? HKD cash?'

text.cn: 用國內號快速開通交通卡/電子支付聯動。
text.en: Quickly set up transit/e-pay linkage with your local number.

lockedHint.cn: 有國內手機號會更絲滑
lockedHint.en: A local number makes this smoother

feedback.cn: 切換成功。你點了凍奶茶，感到離境前夕的平靜。
feedback.en: Setup done. You order iced milk tea and feel calm before departure.

text.cn: 跑去兌換港幣現金，接受匯率差。
text.en: Exchange for HKD cash and eat the spread.

feedback.cn: 匯率刺客比茶餐廳更狠。但至少你能買單了。
feedback.en: The FX spread bites harder than the cafe. At least you can pay.

text.cn: 甩出境外信用卡硬刷（有卡會好過一點）。
text.en: Swipe your foreign credit card (easier if you already linked one).

lockedHint.cn: Tutorial 綁定境外卡後更穩
lockedHint.en: More reliable if you linked a foreign card in Tutorial

feedback.cn: 機器嗶了一聲。手續費隱藏在明細裡，像最後的惡作劇。
feedback.en: The terminal beeps. Fees hide in the statement — a final prank.

text.cn: 你穿過關口。中國生存之旅，到此告一段落。
text.en: You clear the checkpoint. Your China survival run reaches its exit.
